sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55691" key="kateakte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατ-εακτέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n55691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perfringendus</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
